title: Candy Jewels
description: It is a candy-filled puzzle adventure full of surprises! Match candies, break chests and collect coins as you progress through countless levels. Complete fun events like Time Attack or Coin Catch and use boosters to overcome tricky obstacles even faster!

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: Mahjong build farm
description: A cozy blend of classic Mahjong and farm simulation! Start with a small green hill and turn it into a blooming farm by matching tiles and completing levels. The mechanics are simple and relaxing — find and match three identical picture tiles to clear the board. You'll have 90 unique levels with varying difficulty, from easy puzzles to real challenges for experienced players. If you get stuck, bonuses are always there to help.

title: Suika Kawaii Cat Merge game
description: The game is a fun, puzzle-based merging game where players control a dropper that releases animals onto the field. Players must carefully move the dropper to align and drop matching animals. When two of the same type collide, they merge into a higher-level animal. The goal is to keep merging and progressing to create new animals. Special buttons offer abilities like shaking the container or merging random animals, adding strategy and excitement to the gameplay.

title: Ultimate Destruction Simulator
description: Unleash your destructive side in this ultimate demolition experience! Enjoy realistic tower destruction with dynamic physics, and take control of time—slow it down, speed it up, or freeze the action. Experiment with gravity modes, from low to high or even zero gravity, and customize every detail, including debris levels, destructibility, and atmospheric dust. Built for fans of destruction, this game offers the smash-and-crash fun you've been craving!

title: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker
description: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker is your ultimate creative escape into the world of anime character design. Craft stunning anime couples with romantic flair, dress up stylish girl avatars, and mix and match accessories, hairstyles, and outfits. With relaxing ASMR touches and a vibrant anime art style, this avatar creator lets your imagination shine in every love-filled duo you design.

title: Ship Parking Game
description: Solve colorful passenger seating puzzles on ships in this unique traffic jam puzzle game. Help passengers find their seats based on color patterns while managing the flow of people through parking lot-style challenges. It's not just about parking - you're a traffic director managing passenger jams on the high seas.

title: Princess vs Shark
description:
Dive into a magical underwater world with “Princess vs Shark”!
Game Features:
	•	Engaging Gameplay: Solve puzzles, guide water flows, and help the princess overcome obstacles.
	•	Beautiful Graphics: Immerse yourself in the enchanting underwater world.
	•	Challenging Levels: Each level gets harder and more thrilling!
	•	Easy Controls: Simple and intuitive controls make it accessible for everyone.

title: Car Paint
description: Carpaint is a free, family-friendly HTML5 logic puzzle game and casual brain teaser featuring 30 vibrant color grid challenges. Guide colorful cars across a 3×3 board, leaving paint trails to match reference patterns. This addictive, cross-platform online puzzle works in any browser or on mobile - play now!

title: Pubg Hack
description: Experience the ultimate shooting adventure. In Pubg Hack, you step into the battlefield as an elite soldier, exploring massive maps and engaging in fierce combat. Select a location to land and begin searching for supplies.

title: Tag Run
description: Tag Run is an adrenaline-fueled multiplayer action parkour game where 1–4 local players race to ditch the bomb and be the last standing! Tag opponents, use teleport pads and jump springs, and survive thrilling matches with 6 players. Explore six dynamic maps: Pixel, Winter, Lava, Jungle, Candy, and Night, and packed with creative power-ups. Test your reflexes, strategy, and parkour skills in this fast-paced, chaotic playground challenge.

title: Family Squid Challenge
description: Hey Player, bring your friend along and team up in this Squid adventure! There are black and red masked men everywhere, so you must be very careful. Run from them and collect the keys to complete the level. Be cautious — both of you need to survive!

title: Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator
description:
Get ready for an exciting adventure with Noob and his chef friend, who have decided to turn an abandoned building into a top cafe!
Whether they succeed or not depends only on you!
Launch and play Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator!

title: Match Fighter
description:
Match Fighter is a vibrant match-3 fighting game where classic martial arts meet puzzle action! Play as a skilled warrior and take on a series of powerful opponents. Match tiles to strike and unleash special moves in intense one-on-one duels. Every combo you make fuels your fighting spirit. Outsmart your enemies, climb the ranks, and prove yourself as the ultimate martial arts champion!

Can you match your way to victory?

title: PopSortica
description:
PopSortica is a new chapter in Poppy’s adventures! Join the underwater SORTING voyage! Challenging yet relaxing levels await as you sort things out.
The rules are simple, but the difficulty increases with each new level.
Special obstacles and conditions will challenge your skills, while boosters will help you achieve the best results faster.
Dive deep with Mermaid Poppy and challenge yourself in this exciting sea sorting adventure!

title: Zombie Monster Survivors
description: Zombie Monster Survivors is a role-playing game where you will become a brave survivor. Fight against terrifying zombies and monsters in an amazing world. Use your resources wisely and defeat the monsters and zombies that keep coming. Try to survive in this extreme environment. Keep moving and attack large waves of zombies. Collect coins or energy and choose your skills.

title: Geometry Missile
description: Navigate your missile through challenging geometric obstacle courses! Control a triangular missile that automatically flies forward while you tap to guide it up and down. Avoid collisions with various shapes like triangles, rectangles, and spikes to reach the gate at each level's end. Test your reflexes in this fast-paced arcade adventure!

title: Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style
description: Indulge in the iconic and bewitching Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style! Embrace the darkly chic aesthetics, explore mesmerizing outfits, and channel your inner gothic elegance. Discover how celebrities rock the macabre charm of Wednesday Addams with a modern twist. Unleash your inner darkness and redefine elegance with a touch of the mysterious.

title: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure
description: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure is a casual battle game designed for brave boys who love fast-paced action and nonstop adventure. Control fearless heroes as you battle enemies, avoid traps, and blast your way through nervous levels. Defeat monsters to constantly upgrade. Choose your skills to ensure your survival or increase your damage! Keep moving to avoid enemy attacks! Complete all levels to win. Get coins to unlock a variety of awesome weapons. Like darts, axes, etc.

title: Word Search Universe Easter
description: Word Search Universe: Easter is a fun and relaxing puzzle game with a happy spring theme. Enjoy colorful eggs, soft colors, and a peaceful mood while finding hidden words. Easy to play and great for all ages, it’s a perfect way to relax and enjoy the Easter season.

title: Bolt Climb: Tap to the Top
description: Bolt Climb: Tap to the Top is an addictive one-touch climbing game where you control a cute bolt on a mission to climb as high as possible! Just tap and hold to rise — the higher you go, the harder it gets. Can you set a new record?

title: Fury Tanks
description: Beyond the hills and forests, war waits in silence. When it starts, it’s you, your tank and the enemy in your sights. Build your armor, power up your cannon and let instinct guide your aim. When the ground shakes, make sure it’s because you fired first.

title: Money Maker
description: Money Maker is an addictive strategy and idle game that lets you build your fortune from the ground up. Combine smart investments with clever upgrades to grow your virtual empire. Merge pins, upgrade your Money Machine, and watch your income skyrocket as you master the art of wealth creation. With its vibrant visuals and satisfying progression system, Money Maker turns every click into profit!

title: Fix Da Brainrot
description: Fix Da Brainrot is a quirky jigsaw puzzle game with pieces that look like torn paper. Pick your challenge —16 pieces for a quick and easy fix or 32 pieces for a real brain teaser. Drag, drop, and fit the torn pieces together, and watch the picture slowly come alive as you fix the brainrot and conquer the puzzle!

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: Roller Coaster 3D
description:
Go through this roller coaster, pick up more passengers along the way and have more fun!
Can you pass all the obstacles and enjoy all the crazy loops?
Enjoy the ride!
Unlocks all the different mechanics and many levels!

title: Crown & Cannon
description: Crown & Cannon is a fast-paced 2D strategy game where players expand territory, deploy various weapons, and battle dynamic AI on destructible terrain. It features upgradeable units, strategic combat, and is optimized for Web platforms and cross platform.

title: Worm: Apple Quest
description:
Get Ready for Challenging Puzzles in Worm: Apple Quest!

In this captivating puzzle platformer, guide your worm to the legendary Golden Apple while navigating devious obstacles and perilous chasms. The secret to success? Mastering your worm's growing length.

Every apple you collect makes your worm longer, unlocking new paths - but beware! With greater length comes tougher control. One wrong turn and you might get stuck, ending your run.

title: Diamondz
description: DiamondZ is a special variant of Match-3. Here, the goal is not to directly manipulate jewels on the board but to insert them on the left or right side to eliminate groups and make diamonds fall into the mine carts. Help the little miner collect as much wealth as possible!

title: Cooking Empire
description: Cooking Empire is not just a cooking game, it’s a real explosion of flavors and speed! Start frying, boiling, baking and serving dishes from all over the world with one click! Are you ready to become a chef the whole world will remember?

title: Space Craft: Ship War
description:
Explore deep space, piloting a cubic ship that can be infinitely expanded with modules. Collect new decks, melee and ranged weapons, boosters, and rare upgrades on the map, transforming your ship into a true battle station. Enemies also grow, making every encounter a dynamic battle for survival.

Complete levels, upgrade your stats, unlock new skins, and experiment with builds. Vibrant 3D graphics, rich effects, and constant progression make space battles exciting and unpredictable.

title: Block Pixels
description:
Block Pixels is a vibrant puzzle game where classic block-clearing action meets the creative joy of pixel art discovery.

Your main goal is to strategically place colorful pieces to clear lines on the board. But the real magic lies in what you clear. Each block you eliminate contributes to a larger masterpiece. Clearing specific colors helps you build and reveal dozens of charming hidden images, from cute animals to fun objects.

title: Stick Kill 3D
description: Play as a stickman armed with a pistol in this puzzle-based shooter, where precision and clever thinking are key. Find the right angle, line up your shots, and eliminate enemies in creative ways. Each level becomes more challenging, testing your accuracy and problem-solving skills.

title: Toco Teens Halloween Party
description:
Step into the spooky fun world of Toca Teens Halloween Party, a fashionable Halloween dress-up game made just for style lovers! ?
Join the Toca teens as they get ready for the most glamorous Halloween event of the year. Choose from eerie yet elegant outfits, haunting accessories, and bold makeup looks to create the perfect spooky-chic style.

title: Tic Tac Toe Merge
description:
Tic-Tac-Toe Merge is a revolutionary twist on the classic game! Unlike traditional tic-tac-toe, pieces have power levels from 1 to 3. Place higher-level pieces to capture your opponent's weaker ones!

MERGE TO DOMINATE
Combine two level-1 pieces to create level-2, and two level-2 to forge powerful level-3. Create chain reactions when 3+ same-level pieces align — they merge into an even stronger piece!

title: Tile Sort - Match 3
description: Tile Sort - Match 3 is an addictive match-3 puzzle game where your task is to sort and match identical tiles on the board. The game combines classic match-3 gameplay with elements of sorting, adding an extra layer of strategy and logic. Move tiles, creating combinations of three or more identical tiles to clear the board.

title: Brainrot Evolution Game
description: Brainrot Evolution Game is a chaotic meme clicker incremental game where you tap your way through the viral Italian Brainrot universe, unlocking all the brainrot characters and upgrades as you progress! You will get the chance to collect Italian Brainrot characters such as: Bombardino Crocodilo, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala, Bombombini Gussini, Cappuccino Assasino, Lirili Larila, Brr Brr Patapim, Burbaloni Luliloli, Bobritto Bandito, Trippi Troppi, Chimpanzini Bananini and more!

title: Dead Paradise
description: Dead Paradise: Race Shooter is an apocalyptic car game where you drive, shoot enemies, and try to survive until the finish. Completing levels gives you coins to upgrade your car’s missiles, armor, engine, and fuel. You can also buy new vehicles, take missions, and complete daily tasks for extra rewards. Use your resources wisely to make your car stronger and improve your chances of survival.

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Dudu Engineering Truck
description: DuDu Engineering Truck is a casual and puzzle game where you drive engineering trucks to finish tasks on the worksite. Use your sensitivity to shapes to construct a truck and conquer all challenges ahead. If you love car designing and car games, never miss DuDu Engineering Truck! You will enjoy an adventurous journey of being an engineer.

title: Labubu Adventure
description:
Dive into a world of Labubu characters. If you are looking for an amazing adventure, help the little Labubu to complete all the levels and collect coins through the fantasy world.
Whether you want to elevate your gaming skills or just look for simple fun, you can always find something that fits your type.

title: Zombie Rush
description:
Zombies Rush is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter that pits a lone survivor against an endless, evolving horde. Built for fluid action, this 2D arcade shooter, turns every escape into a high-stakes dance with death.
Tilt and weave through trees to outmaneuver the rush.
Each wave brings faster, smarter, and deadlier undead threats.
Experience a modern take on the classic zombie survival genre with clean, stylized graphics and kinetic combat.

title: Stick War Saga
description: Prepare for an epic clash in Stick War: Saga, an exciting blend of fighting, action, strategy, and tower defense. Take command of your stickman army and lead them through nervous war campaigns. Mine resources, build your army, and unleash your strategic power to conquer enemy lands.

title: Candy Carver
description: Play Candy Carver free online and dive into a colorful browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Slice and sculpt sweet treats in a relaxing logic puzzle that feels like a light brain game, mixing creativity with satisfying precision. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game made for easy, calming fun anytime.

title: Lovely Cat Pet Life
description: Call for all pet lovers! If you are a DIY enthusiast or enjoy playing with cute animals, join Lovely Cat: Pet Life, a casual DIY cat game online. Dive into this adorable, fun-filled, and creative game that combines the elements of cats, pets, fashion, and DIY all in one perfect package! Play dress-up game: Try out charming suits on your pet. Decorate an ideal look for your kitten. Enjoy minigames unblocked: Join mini animal parkour games with your little cat.

title: Rock Crawling
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of 3D Rock Crawling Racing, where speed meets strategy and off-road dominance is your only goal. In this high-adrenaline off-road simulator, players take the wheel of powerful 4x4 rock crawlers and navigate some of the most extreme and rugged terrains ever designed in a browser game. From sharp mountain ridges to slippery mud tracks, this is not your average racing game—it’s a true test of control, timing, and grit.

title: Car Dealer Idle
description: Ever dreamed of becoming a top Car Dealer? In Car Dealer Idle, you’ll manage your own vehicle business. Buy and sell cars, expand your showroom, and grow into a real tycoon. Make smart management decisions, upgrade your dealership, and watch your profits skyrocket. Unlock more booths to sell cooler vehicles. Unlock repair areas, test drive areas, etc.

title: Cow Jam Farm puzzle
description: In Cow Jam Farm Puzzle, the peaceful farm turns into a tricky traffic jam that only your logic skills can solve. Cows are stuck in crowded paths, and your mission is to help every one of them escape safely.

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Two Supra Drifters
description: Drift through 3 stunning drift tracks and show how well you can steer the wheels of a powerful supra. Go head to head with your friend in a drift battle and see whose a better drift racer, customize your ride with stunning body colors, underglows and cool rims. Are you ready to showcase your drifting skills?

title: Emoji Drop Themes
description: Dive into the addictive fun of Emoji Drop, a delightful physics puzzle game where strategy meets chain reactions! Drop a variety of charming items, from classic emojis and juicy fruits to wild animals into the container. The magic happens when two matching items touch, merging into something new and bigger. With a challenging Adventure Mode and a relaxing Classic Mode, can you master the merge and discover the final, ultimate item?

title: Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Step into the shadows with Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks! Explore abandoned castles, fend off lurking vampires, and rebuild forgotten halls. Play 200+ haunting Solitaire levels plus 50 chilling Mahjong boards. Face spooky twists like frozen and locked cards, tricky obstacles, and powerful boosts. Search the dark, cobwebby corners of every last level for gems and coins to purchase new castle upgrades and power-ups. Are you ready for a Solitaire adventure that sends shivers down your spine?

title: Archery Master - Bow and Arrow
description:
Join archery adventure and become a bowmaster! Aim, shoot and hit the bullseye!

Pick your bow, defeat other archery masters and don’t let them take you down! Join in this fun and challenging adventure and have fun. Bow masters can really challenge your casual game skills but have no fear! If you enjoy bow and arrow games, then prepare to defeat other bow masters, earn coins, score, and become the ultimate bow master!

title: World Cup Soccer Caps
description: World Cup Soccer Caps is a fun and fast-paced tabletop-style soccer game where you control a team of caps, flicking them to pass, shoot, and score goals. Strategize your moves, outplay your opponent, and aim for victory in this exciting, skill-based challenge!

title: Stickman Escape School
description:
You have to play a student stick who does not like to go to school. Student stickman tired of so much to learn and listen to boring instructors from the stereotypical thinking that the student decides to escape.
While the teacher left the class student teacher decided to see a box and terrified. In the box were a lot of different items. The student not long thinking decided to take advantage of these tools to escape from the school.

title: Wool Sorting
description:
Wool Sorting is a super relaxing and addictive yarn-connecting puzzle game!
In LEVEL 2, slide and merge colorful wool segments to create perfect complete threads. Match colors and sequences with precision — simple to play, yet deeply satisfying!
Challenge yourself across LV.10, 15 & 20. Soothing, brain-teasing fun for any moment!

title: Screamals
description:
Change the shape of the characters with simple up-and-down manipulations
Even if obstacles get in the way, they can change their shape and pass through.
Break through the obstacle, collect the notes and fire them at the boss!

title: Jungle Match Adventures
description: Jungle Match Adventures is a brand-new Match-3 game set deep in the lush Amazon Rainforest. Join the fearless explorer Aria as she uncovers hidden treasures, ancient relics, and precious gems buried in the jungle. Match colorful stones and nature-themed items, solve fun and challenging puzzles, and unlock secrets along the way. Take part in Daily and Weekly Challenges, enjoy Daily Surprises, and progress through hundreds of exciting levels in this unforgettable jungle adventure.

title: Run from Baba Yaga
description:
Run from Baba Yaga is a potentially endless runner in which player has to collect as much treasures as possible and run as long as possible while Baba Yaga is trying to catch up with them.

During the chase, Baba Yaga gradually gets stronger: her movespeed and damage increase.An outstanding result can be achieved if player reaches the last stage of the game by running 400 hexes (hexagonal pieces of path).

title: Snow Road Puzzle
description: Play Snow Road Puzzle free online — an addictive browser puzzle game with no download, no install, and no login required. Slide icy tiles, create snowy roads, and solve fast-paced logic puzzle levels instantly. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and brain puzzle challenges at school or home. This free online puzzle game is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and fully playable on desktop or phone. Enjoy endless winter logic puzzles and sharpen your brain anytime, anywhere.

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Oil Digging
description: Oil Digging is a simulation game where you build and operate an oil rig. This game offers the experience of oil mining without the morning smell of oil! Dive into the world of oil drilling. Will your oil operation be a profitable masterpiece or an expensive mess? Start by finding an oil well, drilling it, and then building an efficient pipe system. Let's see if you can get rich!

title: Swat Force Vs Terrorists
description: Swat Force Vs Terrorists is an intense tactical shooter where players take on the role of elite SWAT team members engaging in high-stakes confrontations with terrorists. The game emphasizes teamwork and tactical coordination, requiring players to utilize professional counter-terrorism skills and equipment across various complex urban environments.

title: Mind Gambit
description: Mind Gambit is a relaxing puzzle game inspired by the classic Peg Solitaire. Plan your moves carefully to jump and remove pegs until only one remains. There’s no timer, just pure strategy and thoughtful gameplay. With unlimited levels, the challenge never ends.

title: Strongblade
description:
Your favorite gameplay: match-3 puzzle game with building elements! Play three-in-a-row and set up impressive campgrounds!
Hundreds of varied levels with incredible boosters and explosive combinations!
Lots of game events and tough challenges! Complete exciting quests to upgrade your camp!
Atmospheric fantasy world: detailed animations, picturesque landscapes and charming characters!
Interesting characters who are ready to become your friends and join your journey!

title: Wednesday Dark Academia
description: With Wednesday Dark Academia, you can choose from various unique and stylish outfits, accessories, and makeup options. Start with her makeup, creating a look that's perfect for school or the ballroom. Play dark lipstick and eyeshadow, and with a little bit of imagination, you can create a look that's all your own. Next, dress her up for a fun day at school, and then see what party look you can put together for her. Style her hair and pick the right accessories for a complete look.

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Smartle
description: Smartle is a free online word puzzle game where you rearrange letters by swapping them on a 5x5 grid to form words. Win the game by creating 5 horizontal 5-letter words on the field. There are multiple valid combinations of words which can win the game.

title: Palm Island Solitaire
description:
Palm Island Solitaire – Your Tropical Card Challenge! ☀️

Catch the island breeze with Palm Island Solitaire, a fresh twist on Golf Solitaire that blends strategy with sunny vibes.

Score low, reshuffle when needed, and enjoy every move with playful golf lingo and island flair.

Ready to relax, play smart, and swing into fun?  Let the adventure begin!

title: My horse is amazing
description:
Ride a horse and overcome obstacles: fences, pits and water obstacles. Control the jumps — tap and release to jump accurately.

Collect powerups with powerups — increase attack and health. The further you run, the stronger your horse becomes!

Your steed is growing: it's getting faster and more powerful. Upgrade it and keep running. At the end of each level is a boss battle! Show what you are capable of!

title: Sniper Master
description: Take aim in mid-air and strike at the perfect moment! In Sniper Master, you jump, float, and fire while airborne—time your shots to eliminate targets with clean, satisfying hits. Stay calm, lead your aim, and master precision shooting across multiple levels. Earn rewards, improve your skills, and become the ultimate airborne marksman.

title: Cosmic Dash
description: Jump into Cosmic Dash – an endless space runner full of speed and challenges! Dodge debris, break through asteroids, and gather tokens as you race across the solar system. Use boosts, shrinks, and jumps to chase high scores and experience thrilling interplanetary action!

title: Tappy Bird - Avoid the Spikes
description: Tap on the screen to move bird up, avoiding the spikes as the level progresses more spikes appear and the possibility to collect coins increases.

title: Number Bubble Shooter Wild West
description: Saddle up for a Wild West number bubble shooter! Shoot and match numbers to merge them into higher values, creating bigger combos and clearing the board. Plan your shots, stack smart, and ride through dusty levels full of challenge and fun!

title: Animal Bus Traffic Jam
description: All aboard for the cutest puzzle ride ever in Animal Bus Traffic Jam. This clever match-3 sort puzzle and casual logic game challenges you to help adorable animal passengers find their correct buses. Each level is a traffic jam of colorful buses filled with cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Your mission is to sort the animals by type or color, match them into the right buses, and clear the jam with smart moves.

title: Brainrot Click to Hatch
description: Enter Brainrot Click to Hatch, the most absurd and epic clicker at the same time. With every tap you release BRAINROTS, each one stranger and more chaotic than the last. Accumulate energy, unlock upgrades, and watch how the BRAINROTS evolve into impossible forms. From viral classics to MAX POWER versions, the challenge is clear: collect them all before losing your mind. Do you think you can dominate the Brainrot universe with just a click?

title: Solitaire Klondike: Eternal Russian Classic
description:
Rediscover the captivating world of Solitaire Klondike!

This timeless card game not only entertains but also enhances logical thinking, offering hours of engaging pastime. Play your favorite solitaire anytime, anywhere.

Join the community of enthusiasts and prove your mastery in Klondike!

Keep an eye on the leaderboard and become the top player among all!

title: Block Breaker
description: Embark on a 2D adventure filled with dynamic physics! Break ice blocks, use springs and portals, and launch the character through the air to reach the goal platform. Master the environment and discover all the creative ways to complete each level!"

title: ASMR Beauty Japanese Spa
description: ASMR Beauty Japanese Spa is a relaxing style game where you guide a charming girl through a soothing Japanese hair spa filled with calming treatments and revitalizing masks. Once refreshed, dress her in elegant kimonos, choose delicate accessories, and personalize her look with stunning hairstyles, makeup, and shoes. It's your peaceful retreat into beauty, fashion, and creative expression.

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Last Ufo Defense

Last UFO DefenseThe galaxy is no safe place. 
As the last UFO of your kind, you stand alone against endless waves of hostile alien forces determined to wipe you out.
Pilot your hovering warship and unleash its full potential:One UFO, endless enemies. 
Survive as long as you can with precise upgrades and tactical choices.
Face relentless alien swarms in an endless survival challenge.You are the final line of defense in a hostile galaxy.
How long can the last UFO endure?

title: SCP 173 Escape
description: Step into the role of SCP-173 and break free from the Foundation’s control in a tense stealth experience built around a deadly rule: you can MOVE only when no one is LOOKING at you. Hide in the shadows, avoid patrols, and choose the perfect moment to dash through dark corridors where every mistake leads to capture.

title: Crazy Bike Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 2 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Crazy Bike Stunts PvP!

title: Poppy Strike 5
description: Poppy Strike 5 is a first person shooter game with elements of horror where your mission is to use big arsenal of weapons to shoot huggy wuggy and kisiy misiy and find a way to escape liminal spaces of haunted toy factory.

title: Supermarket Simulator: Dream Store
description: Build and expand your shop: add shelves, displays, products, and decorations to attract more customers. Hire staff and manage their skills and motivation. Handle orders, discounts, and marketing campaigns. Every day, your store grows bigger and more profitable!

title: Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked
description: Welcome to Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked, a charming, casual ASMR game that combines the joy of food, cooking, and ASMR sounds! Experience as a talented baker and join the lovely Labubu on a mouthwatering adventure. In the game, you will take orders from your diners, each with unique requests for bread. From croissants to loaves of baguettes, you need to pack each bread for your customers on time.

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: Shipbuilding tycoon
description:
Do you want to become a shipyard manager and build big ships?
Step into the role of a shipyard manager and grow your very own ship empire in this addictive idle game! As you build ships, earn profits, and unlock epic vessels, you’ll expand your factory and boost production efficiency.

Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle
description: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle is an irresistibly fun puzzle casual game that bursts with juicy visuals and addictive gameplay! A brilliant combination of puzzle and match mechanics. From the moment you start, you’ll be hooked on its satisfying matching mechanics and clever level design.

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Mahjong Tile Club
description: Step into the relaxing world of Mahjong Tile Club, where timeless tile-matching meets innovative gameplay! This solitaire-style mahjong game is perfect for anyone looking for a calm yet engaging puzzle experience. With simple rules and soothing gameplay, it’s easy to pick up and hard to put down. Match identical tiles, clear the board, and enjoy a satisfying sense of accomplishment.

title: Smart Dots Reloaded
description: Smart Dots Reloaded is a fresh remake of the classic Dots and Boxes puzzle from Windows 3.1. Players take turns drawing lines between dots. Completing a square earns a point, and the game ends when the board is full. Featuring modern visuals, smooth animations, and both AI and two-player modes, this is a strategy game that’s easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Grand Mahjong Connect
description:
Grand Mahjong Connect is a relaxing yet challenging triple-match puzzle game with a fresh twist on classic mahjong.

Select tiles from the board and match three identical pieces to clear them.
Plan your moves carefully — space is limited, and every choice matters!

Enjoy beautiful tiles, smooth gameplay, and satisfying match effects as you clear the board and progress through levels.

Can you master the art of triple matching?

title: Ball Jump Switch The Colors
description:
Tap on the screen, that will make the ball bounce higher and higher. The ball has one color, and can pass through obstacle with the same color, or sneak in between obstacles with different colors.

Easy-to-play and addictive !

title: Rope Rescue! - Unique Puzzle
description: Rope Rescue is a puzzle game with simple controls but a challenging twist. Strategize to save everyone using ropes while dodging tricky traps and obstacles. Stay sharp to overcome each level and claim exciting rewards. With its easy-to-learn mechanics and increasingly complex challenges, this game will keep you hooked as you perfect your rescue skills!

title: Idle Pop Merge
description: Get ready for endless fun in Idle Pop Merge! Drag and drop characters into the slots to merge them into stronger versions. The more you merge, the more powerful your team becomes. It's a simple, addictive game that anyone can enjoy—whether you’re on desktop or mobile. Perfect for players who love puzzle challenges with a strategic twist!

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: Arrow Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced and strategic arrow challenge in Arrow Escape, an addictive arrows puzzle escape game built for players who love logic puzzles and intense puzzle escape moments.

title: Drive-in Cinema: Idle Game
description: Drive-in Cinema: Idle Game lets you build your perfect movie theater and run a profitable business. Choose the best films to satisfy guests and increase income. Expand parking, open snack kiosks, automate processes, and hire employees to optimize operations. Complete over 50 missions, enjoy colorful 3D graphics, and immerse yourself in a unique atmosphere. Buy movies, prepare snacks, and grow your theater to attract more viewers. Ready to become the top drive-in owner?

title: Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil
description:
Discover Hidden Treasures in Brazil – Play "Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil"!

Embark on a thrilling hidden object adventure through Brazil! Search and find hidden objects in stunning locations, enjoy fun mini-games, and collect unique souvenirs.

Explore famous landmarks like SugarLoaf Mountain and the Amazon jungle. Visit ancient castles, vibrant museums, and mysterious caves. Experience the energy of Rio de Janeiro and unwind on Brazil’s beautiful beaches.

title: Hamstercycle
description:
Help a genius hamster bust out of a mad professor's lab on his slick DIY ride - the Hamstercycle!

Jump across furniture and whatever junk the prof left lying around to reach the portal at the end of each room. But watch out - the floor is guarded by laser sensors! Touch it, and the hamster gets caught!

Fun physics, simple controls, and hundreds of exciting levels await!

title: Pop Star
description: Ready to relax, think, and have fun all at once? In Star Pop Mania, the rules are simple, but the satisfaction is endless. Tap two or more matching blocks to pop them and clear the board. The bigger the combo, the higher the score—and the more rewarding it feels!

title: Block Blaster Puzzle
description: Aim for high scores or complete level objectives. Rotate and arrange blocks to clear rows and columns while enjoying stunning visuals. Each perfect move brings satisfaction, challenging you to beat your best and master each puzzle!

title: Fly and shoot 1. Italian Bosses
description: Nostalgia for 8-bit games. A classic arcade shooter with leveling elements and character selection. Fly and shoot, take down enemies, and blow up and destroy everything in your path. Defeat the boss at the end of each level. Save Laba and earn bonuses for doing so. Each difficulty level is slightly different. Enemies become more aggressive, and the speed increases.

title: Dino Slide
description: A puzle slide game wher you have to feed Dino. Move Dino with the keyboard arrow or swipe. Each level you have to complete the goal that consist in eating fruits and vegetables.

title: Cross Connect Word
description:
Fun and relaxing crossword puzzle!

Cross Word Connect is a fun but challenging word game.
Enjoy modern word game with the combine of word search and crossword! In this fantastic crossword puzzle, you will improve your vocabulary and spelling skills.

title: Cargo Path Puzzle
description: Cargo Path Puzzle is a challenging 3D puzzle game that tests both logic and movement strategy. Navigate through complex levels filled with collapsing platforms, ice slides, trampolines, directional blocks, and deadly voids. Every level has only one correct path, so you'll need to think ahead and plan each move wisely. A single wrong step could trap you or block the way forward.

title: Tile Match: The Immersive Puzzle
description:
Match. Merge. Master the Tiles!
Dive into Tile Match: The Immersive Experience, a satisfying and relaxing puzzle game where your goal is to match three identical tiles to clear the board.
Use logic and strategy to complete levels — but don’t let the board fill up!

✅ Easy to learn, hard to master
? Addictive tile-matching gameplay
? Boosts memory and focus
? Perfect for short breaks or long sessions

title: Lazy Workers
description: The employees in the office have started slacking off and everyone is asleep. As the boss, you need to get the office back up and running. To do this, use your mouse and send employees to rows of desks. Move workers so they do not bump into each other. Your job will get a little more difficult with each level. If you cannot pass the level, you can use the option to skip the level.

title: Slime Rush
description: Join the colorful adventure of *Slime Rush*! Control a lively group of slimes as you race along challenging paths, avoiding obstacles and growing your slimes. Collect gems to unlock unique skins and power-ups. Can you lead your slimes to victory? Start your journey in *Slime Rush* today!

title: Hit ball
description:
Hit ball is a fast-paced arcade game with roguelike elements, in which you fight off waves of enemies with ricocheting balls! With each shot you break through obstacles, knock down monsters and earn experience to improve your abilities.
Dozens of levels with unique traps, walls, boosting balls and dangerous bosses await you. Collect boosters, pick up abilities, regenerate health and strategize to survive the battle!

title: Hidden Pairs Mahjong
description: Match and clear all the tile in this Hidden Pairs Mahjong solitaire game. Use your observation skills to find and select identical open tiles to remove them from the board. With beautifully designed classic Mahjong symbols, smooth animations, and a calming background, each level offers a fresh puzzle challenge.Earn bonus time, increase your score, and progress through endless levels of tile-matching fun!

title: Russian Fishing at Sea
Hide and Luig
description: Hide and Luig is a whimsical point-and-click hide-and-seek adventure where your only goal is to find the ever-elusive Luig—who insists on hiding inside the weirdest objects imaginable.

title: Words with Prof. Wisely
description:
ind words by connecting letters. Improve your attentiveness, train your brain!

Keep in mind - some crosswords will be difficult to solve.

title: Funny Walk Fail Run
description: Funny Walk Fail Run is a fun-filled arcade action game with funny and magical gameplay! You will control a villain in the game to do challenges. But don't expect him to walk steadily, because he always falls and bumps in all sorts of funny positions! Your job is to help him navigate each step of the shaky road.

title: Loop Survivors Zombie City
description: A fast-paced action-survival game where you fight zombies and mutants, upgrade your city and character, collect weapons and armor. Build your shelter, unlock random perks, and become the ultimate survivor!

title: Dessert DIY
description: Step into a sweet little food studio and craft desserts for hungry customers! Follow simple step-by-step recipes, pick the right ingredients, and assemble tasty treats exactly as requested. Satisfy each guest to earn coins, then spend your rewards in the shop to unlock more items, upgrades, and delicious options. Easy to learn, relaxing to play, and full of colorful desserts!

title: Construction Truck: Building Games for Kids
description: A vibrant and engaging construction game where kids can build houses, drive vehicles, and explore a world of fun activities. With easy-to-follow instructions, children learn new words, develop skills, and enjoy creative play in a safe, interactive environment.

title: Jigsort Puzzles
description: Jigsort Puzzle is an app that is art puzzle and lets you complete jigsaw puzzle game for free! Various difficulty levels for casual and experiences puzzlers!

title: Woodoku Block Puzzle
description: Welcome to experience the Woodoku Block Puzzle! This is a super fun casual puzzle game, especially for relaxing in your free time. The gameplay is very simple and very challenging! There are four modes you can choose from.

title: PaperWar.io
description: There are so many unexplored areas! Conquering them is the key to mastering the game. Expand your territory, eliminate other players who threaten your progress and aim to conquer 100% of each new map. Choose from 9 special skins to express your style!

title: Loop Ghost
description: Time loop puzzle: ghosts of your past cycles automatically repeat your moves. Use them to press buttons, open passages, and escape together.

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: NG: Flow Lines
description: Flow Lines is an engaging and straightforward puzzle game where the main objective is to connect dots of the same color through a continuous path on a grid.

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Foot Hospital
description: HELP! Doctor, I hurt my feet, ouch! It is so painful!Could you please help me to cure my feet? I know you have the best medical tools here!

title: Mega Makeup - Seasons Best
description: Mega Makeup Seasons Best is the ultimate makeup game where creativity knows no bounds! Design stunning looks for each month of the year with vibrant eyeshadows, bold lipsticks, sparkling gems, and stylish accessories. Choose between Pro Mode for precision or Freestyle Mode for endless color combinations. Complete your seasonal masterpiece with matching jewelry and hair accessories. Perfect for makeup enthusiasts, this game is your go-to for all things beauty and style! Play now!

title: Mystical Blade 3D
description: Enter the world of Mystical Blades, where you design and battle your own B-Blades! Mix blades, rings, and elements to create powerful combos, then face players worldwide in thrilling battles. With stunning graphics and realistic physics, prove your skills and become the ultimate B-Blades master!

title: Paper.io 2
description:
Conquer as much territory as possible and beat the competition.
A smooth drawing experience!

Use your paper block to steal the area from your online opponents in this game. Capture as much space as possible and try to get the highest score in the lobby. If you move outside your own color, your tail becomes exposed. You will be eliminated when someone manages to catch your tail. So you need to take risks to expand your colored area.

title: Super Sprunki Clicker
description: Enjoy the Sprunki World in this clicker idle game. Immerse yourself in the beats and music simulation, create the band, and use the rewards to buy new upgrades and features. Break the screen touching the sprunkis, hire automatic clickers, social media features, instruments, and everything to become the Sprunki King.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Dress Up Run
description: Play Dress Up Runway, the ultimate fashion dress up game where style meets speed! Collect outfits, change looks on the go, and shine in the final runway walk. Perfect for players searching “dress up game,” “fashion game,” or “makeover run,” this stylish challenge lets you become a fashion queen while racing through exciting levels. With princess vibes, outfit makeovers, and endless glam fun, Dress Up Runway is the best free fashion challenge for US teens and students!

title: Dino Simulator City Attack
description:
In the year 2024, not only are dinosaurs no longer seen, but they live peacefully with humans in the urban center. Not quite at peace, however!

Play as one of several prehistoric dinosaur species in this free 3D game where you may run, crush, demolish, leap, disturb, and do just about everything else you can imagine. Each level has its own set of objectives that you must accomplish in order to access the next. Picking your favorite dinosaur from the list of possible species is also an option.

title: Granny GTA Vegas
description: Granny GTA Vegas drops the infamous horror legend into the heart of sin city! Armed and unhinged, Granny escapes her haunted house and brings chaos to the neon streets of Las Vegas. With red-hooded masked enemies hot on her trail, she must shoot her way through crime-ridden alleys, casino districts, and the Vegas Strip.

title: Giant Crowd io House Capture
description: Come to lead your squad in Giant Crowd io House Capture, a fun .io strategy adventure game. You will expand your power in the city, occupy more houses and become the winner of the city. Grow your crowd by collecting more followers as you explore the city.

title: Darling Doll
description: Darling Doll is the ultimate paper doll DIY game that offers a perfect blend of character creation and dress-up game. With a vast collection of outfits, accessories, and hairstyles, you can unleash your creativity and design unique avatars that reflect your personal style. Whether you prefer chibi dolls or glamorous fashion dolls, Darling Doll has got you covered.

title: Commando Force 2
description: Get ready for a gun games adventure with Commando Force 2! Jump into a fast-paced shooter! Join the fun and dive into the action! Unlock new weapons, dominate the maps, and show everyone what you’ve got!

title: Strawberry Hero
description: Stick your fork and climb to the top! Hold down to keep sticking the fork continuously. If your fork hits a hero or an obstacle, it’s game over! Stick the fork just above the falling hero’s feet to trigger a Super Jump and earn a high score!

title: Candy Match Puzzle
description:
Dive into a delightful puzzle experience with Candy Puzzle Match, where matching candies is all about tapping! Simply tap on groups of two or more adjacent candies of the same color to clear them from the board. The more candies you clear at once, the higher your score!

Watch the board shift and cascade with every move as you complete deliciously fun objectives. With colorful visuals and satisfying chain reactions, this game is perfect for fans of casual and relaxing puzzle games.

title: Princess Rescue Fruit Connect
description: Begin a fruity puzzle adventure. Princess Rescue Fruit Connect is a delightful match puzzle game where your mission is to rescue a beautiful princess by matching fruits and solving tricky levels. Connect two identical fruits to eliminate them. But notice clearing the board before time runs out. All while progressing to rescue the princess.

title: Block LEGENDS!
description:
Drag and match blocks!
Block LEGENDS! is a casual puzzle game, where you drag and arrange blocks on a board. Once you form a line, either horizontally or vertically, you clear that line, and along with that, you may find - diamonds, bombs and score multipliers! 
Finish missions - earn rewards! Missions reset every few minutes, so keep the grind on!?
Once you have enough diamonds, you can buy Bombs and NUKES☢️!  You can use these powerups to breeze through levels!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Ballerina Cappuccina First Date
description: Tonight’s a big night—Cappuccina and Tung Tung Sahur are heading out on their very first date, and they want to look perfect. In Ballerina Cappuccina First Date, you’re the stylist behind their special evening. From choosing outfits to adding finishing touches, it’s up to you to make sure both of them shine.

title: Merge Master
description: A casual mobile game centered around matching and elimination. The game features vibrant colors, coupled with a visual style rich in beach elements. With background music and sound effects reminiscent of leisurely walks along the beach, it creates a relaxed beach-strolling environment that immerses players in an auditory experience.

title: Ellie Christmas Makeup
description: Experience the joy of festive makeovers with Ellie Christmas Makeup game! This fun, holiday game lets you guide Ellie to create three Christmas-themed makeup looks: Candy Cane Queen, Christmas Queen, and iconic character-inspired. Perfect for makeup lovers and enthusiasts of holiday-themed games alike, this girl game takes you on a journey filled with creativity, color, and Christmas cheer! Craft Ellie's look using assorted eyeshadows, lipsticks, patterned blushes, accessories, and more.

title: Tunnel Road
description: Tunnel Road is an adrenaline-filled arcade game that requires quick reflexes, sharp focus and a great visual reaction! Keep up with the speed, avoid obstacles and cover the longest distance while advancing in a colorful and dynamic tunnel!

title: Run N Shoot
description: You run and you shoot. That’s all you do, but this deceptively simple game mixes up the action and racks up the adrenalin with surprises round every corner to ensure you never get bored. Trigger finger itchy?

title: Airport Security
description: Airport Security is a casual simulation game that immerses you in the high-stakes world of airport safety, placing you in the role of a vigilant security officer dedicated to safeguarding a bustling terminal. Your mission is to maintain a secure environment by identifying suspicious passengers, spotting fake passports, and uncovering hidden contraband using cutting-edge X-ray machines.

title: Youtuber Mcraft 2Player
description: You need to help the YouTuber girl and her boyfriend escape from prison. In this two-player adventure, they must collect all the YouTube plaques without getting too far apart, obtain the key and the golden plaque, and reach the chest. Open the chest and run to the door. You need to be very fast, you must escape from prison!

title: Devil Duck : Not a Troll Game
description: Devil Duck is an action-packed platformer game that challenges players to navigate through treacherous levels teeming with danger. Set in the fiery depths of the Devil's Domain, you play as a fearless adventurer on a quest to reclaim stolen treasures guarded by the sinister Devil King.

title: Bubble Up
description:
Help BUB, a tiny bubble, fulfill its dream of reaching the blazing sun. Use his bubble friends, BLE, to push BUB past obstacles, rise from the ground to towering buildings, and conquer the skies!

You only need to shoot out BLE by click left mouse, good luck!

title: Golf Mini
description: Golf Mini is a fun and addictive game in which your goal is to get the ball to the hole in the minimum number of strokes. Complete levels, each of which is a unique golf course with various obstacles and traps.

title: Sort Works: Nuts & Order
description:
Sort Works: Nuts & Order is a fun color-sorting puzzle game where you organize colorful nuts onto matching bolts.

? How to Play:

* Tap a bolt to pick up the top nut.
* Drop it onto a matching color or empty bolt.
* Sort all nuts by color to win!

? Easy to learn, challenging to master, with hundreds of levels and a clean mechanical design—perfect for puzzle fans and casual gamers!

title: Strategy of war. Tanks and helicopters.
description:
"Strategy of war" is an exciting strategy war game where the player has to control squads of tanks and helicopters, develop his base, choose battle tactics and fight the enemy.

The game offers a wide range of equipment and weapons, a variety of missions and tasks, as well as the opportunity to improve and develop their forces. It is important to properly allocate resources, as well as use tactical techniques to defeat the enemy.

title: Spiderlox Theme Park Battle
description: Join a creative and action sandbox adventure in Spiderlox Theme Park Battle! You'll play the role of a superhero Spiderman. Explore a huge theme park. Begin an exciting fight. In the game, you will face many enemies. Use your agility and strategy to win.

title: Pixel Fun Color By Number
description: Pixel Fun - Color By Number is a fun coloring game that lets you bring pixel art to life. With casual number-based instructions, you’ll fill in each pixel square to reveal stunning artwork.Each image is divided into tiny pixels. Each is assigned a number that corresponds to a color. For example, click on the city scene to fill in color and light up the street.

title: 2048 Match Balls
description: With super simple rules and addictive gameplay, this logic game offers endless fun while challenging your brain. Merge balls and level up. Each merge increases the value of the balls while also changing their color and size. Be smart and dive into a vibrant world of numbers!

title: Drunk But Not Wasted Knight
description: Stumble into a moonlit alley and befriend a tipsy yet oddly wise knight in this comedic medieval visual novel. Banter, make choices, and nudge affection as you chase stories, dodge trouble, and unlock quirky endings.

title: Arcade Rope
description:
Swing between platforms in Arcade Rope! Play free and online in this rope-swinging adventure.
Arcade Rope is a fast-paced and addictive skill game where your goal is to swing from platform to platform using a rope. Perfectly time your swings to avoid falling into the abyss and see how far you can go. The gameplay is simple yet challenging, making it ideal for quick play sessions. Stay alert, react quickly, and master the art of swinging to survive longer.

title: Winter Wolf
description: Winter has come, and the snowfall has begun. Since it's Christmas time, the wolf must find three stars during the winter. The wolf needs to carefully hunt and catch three sheep, take their stars, and gather all the bones on the path to avoid starving. It must also be cautious of the hunters in the forest. At the end of the level, it must reach the dark portal to teleport to its desired location.

title: Epic Mine
description: In the game, you will need to correctly organize the smelting of resources in order to sell everything as profitably as possible. At the same time, it is important not to forget that resources should also be spent on skill upgrades! The game values quick reactions, but the ability to earn well will allow you to overcome any difficult spot in the game with patience and intelligence.

title: Arrow Wave
description: Explore a world where a wave moves through various obstacles, overcoming challenges along the way. Test your reaction and perseverance!

title: Tangram Puzzle
description:
Tangram Puzzles is a relaxing geometric logic game where you must recreate a given shape using classic tangram pieces. The challenge trains your spatial thinking, visualization, and ability to rotate and position shapes so they perfectly fit the silhouette.

Don’t be afraid to experiment — sometimes a wrong combination in one place prevents the correct placement somewhere else.

title: Dead Zone Mech Ops
description:
Dead Zone: Mech Ops thrusts players into the heart of a scorched Earth ravaged by endless war, where autonomous factions and rogue AI compete for control over the planet’s last remaining strongholds. You are a combat pilot in the elite “Mech Ops” unit — the final line of defense in a world on the brink of total collapse.
Players will command next-gen combat exosuits equipped with modular weapon systems, advanced targeting tech, and adaptive armor that reacts to battlefield conditions.

title: MeatRider
description: Welcome to "MeatRider" — an intense action-packed game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by zombies. You find yourself right in the middle of the chaos, where your only goal is to survive at all costs. Choose one of the unique combat vehicles, each with its own special abilities and weapons, and get ready for dynamic battles across a zombie-infested desert landscape.

title: Portal Hop
description: Portal Hop is a platform puzzle game where you carry a portal above your head and use it to solve tricky challenges! Move through each level by warping yourself onto higher platforms, collecting plus and minus power-ups to adjust the height of your portal. Think smart, plan your moves, and find the perfect path to reach your destination. Ready to warp your way to victory

title: Data Diggers
description:
Merge USBs, choose blocks, download data, get money,and buy USBs
Merge the USBs for increased efficiency.

Dig Data in Data Diggers, actually you rather download Data with your USBs.
The higher the GB amount of your USB, the faster you can download the data.

title: 100 Doors Puzzle Box
description: The main goal in 100 Doors Puzzle Box is to escape the room. Using all the possibilities you need to open each of 100 doors and move the elevator to the next floor. Search for hidden objects, sovle puzzles and use an items to do this!

title: Brilliant Jewels
description: Brilliant Jewels is a Match 3 game where you can either play against the time or try to pass levels with limited amount of moves. If you are feeling confident, you can also challenge the hard mode on the time attack mode. This game doesn't lack any sparkle!

title: Cute Relaxing Matching 3 Tiles
description:
Fun Farm Wonderland is a light but extremely fun game from our team

Fun Farm Wonderland is a puzzle game combined with a Farm theme, to create a feeling of lightness and relaxation for all players participating in them.

Have you ever played a match 3 tiles game with such cute design and interface? If not, don't skip our game, for the following reasons

title: Solitaire Story Tripeaks 6
description: The highly anticipated 6th installment of one of the most popular Solitaire Story card games of all time! Your good friend Foxy will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting countries, landscapes, and landmarks like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, Korea, New Zealand, Madagascar, North Pole, and Fiji. With 6700+ levels, Daily Missions, Weekly Air Balloon and Pet Events, and dozens of new card designs, this is the biggest Solitaire Story game yet!

title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
description:
Enjoy a relaxing round of Golf Solitaire, a fun and easy-to-play card game. The goal is to clear the board by matching cards that are one rank higher or lower than the one on the discard pile. Don’t worry about suits—just focus on the numbers! If you’re stuck, you can draw from the deck to keep the game going. Play at your own pace and see how many rounds you can win.

Perfect for a quick break or to unwind at the end of the day!

title: Idle Drive: Merge, Upgrade, Drive
description: Welcome to Idle Drive: Merge Upgrade & Drive! Unleash your creativity, craft a unique vehicle for travels. Start with a basic car, enhance it using in-game currency earned by tapping. Accumulate funds for components like engines and tires. Merge parts for higher levels, boosting speed and power. Visit the garage to customize your car. Idle DriftDrive offers exhilarating fun and satisfaction of creating your own ride. Perfect for car enthusiasts and racing fans. Exciting moments await you!

title: Fish Master: Go Fish
description:
You’d think that a game called Go Fish would be based on the classic card game, but you’d be wrong. Fish Master – Go Fish is all about taking your ship to the middle of the sea and fishing until your boat can’t hold any more fish!

There are dozens of different fish types in the sea, and it’s your job to reel them all in! As you catch fish, your library of fish types will fill up, so you’ll always know what’s left to catch.

title: Zombie Siege.io
description: As a soldier at the last base with unlimited potential, you must arm yourself and battle against dangerous zombies! Use your wisdom to select the best weapons, skills, and talents to defend against waves of zombies. How many maps will you be able to save?

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Car Parking Simulator
description: Car Parking Simulator is a driving challenge game you won't be able to put down! Whether you want to tackle challenging levels or practice precision parking, you can choose from different modes to start your adventure. From compact car models to heavy-duty truck options, every level offers a fresh driving challenge. As you progress, the levels become more demanding, turning every success into a rewarding challenge.

title: Castle Craft
description: Embark on a mystical journey in Castle Craft, where you merge resources and unlock the secrets of time. Start in a land cloaked in fog, using ancient keys to reveal hidden territories and trace your lost family's steps across eras.

title: Javelin Battle
description: Javelin Battle is a spear-throwing physics puzzle game with 2D stickman models. We need you to eliminate all incoming enemies at each level in the Normal Mode. When you destroy enemy infantry's shields, they will run to you quickly. I strongly suggest you destroy the enemy spearmen on the platforms first. Don't forget to choose skills to increase your abilities and power. Keep calm and aim carefully.

title: Word Art – Color Book Puzzle
description: Discover a delightful gaming experience that combines the thrill of solving word puzzles with the joy of bringing art to life. In Word Art – Color Book Puzzle, you’ll embark on a creative journey where words are the key to unlocking vibrant colors and stunning illustrations.

title: Maze Escape : Craft Man
description:
Objective:
Navigate through a series of craft doors and escape the maze without being killed by terrifying entities.

Gameplay:

    Explore the Maze: Move through a maze filled with multiple doors, each leading to new and more challenging areas.
    Survive the Entities: Avoid or outsmart various entities that lurk in the maze, each with unique behaviors and attack patterns.
    Find the Next Door: Continuously search for the next door to progress to subsequent levels of the maze.
    Collect Items: Gather keys to unlock doors, coins for upgrades, and useful tools to aid in your survival.

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: Legend of Fireball
description:
Fireballs are your weapon of choice as you tap on objects to obliterate them and earn rewards. Every tap brings you closer to becoming the ultimate Fireball King! Collect various fireballs, costumes, and upgrades, enhancing your powers with every victory. Master cool fireball skills to crush objects even faster and more efficiently.
Race against time to demolish all targets in thrilling challenges, proving you're the strongest fireball wielder in the universe!

title: Flick Baseball Super Homerun
description:
Experience various baseball pitches based on the pendulum movement. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation in this baseball game.
# One Flick Easy Control
You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter.

title: Mask Evolution 3d
description: Mask Evolution 3D is a parkour game. Move the masks through digital gates to boost the value of your mask. You can also collect decorations and attendants to make your mask even more artistic. Finally, auction your masks to sell them for a high price and earn more money. Please note,be careful of obstacles such as spikes on the road, they will devalue your mask and you will fail when your mask value is 0. Get ready for an exciting journey to make your very own mask!

title: Memoji
description: Match pairs of emojis and word cards to uncover and learn about a significant historical event from around the world each day.

title: Merge Blocks 2048
description: Swipe to slide numbered tiles on a 4x4 grid. Match two identical blocks to merge them into a bigger number. Start from 2 and work your way up to 2048 and beyond. The board fills up with every move so plan ahead. Chain multiple merges in a row to build combos and earn bonus coins. Spend coins in the shop on power-ups like Undo, Extra Life, Score Boost, Shuffle and Head Start. Beat your high score and try to reach the highest tile possible. Easy to learn, hard to master.

title: Lovie Chic's Coachella Festival
description: Step into the vibrant world of Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival, the ultimate festival dress-up game! Style your character with trendy outfits, accessories, and makeup to shine at the iconic Coachella Festival. With simple controls and endless creativity, Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival is perfect for quick fun or long gaming sessions.

title: Rush Car Driving - Race Master
description:
Rush Car Driving: Race Master is a driving game that delivers thrilling action as you navigate heavy traffic. 

Experience the adrenaline of high-speed racing in heavy traffic, where split-second decisions can be the difference between victory and defeat. Explore a variety of immersive environments, from busy urban highways to rural roads. 

Choose from a wide selection of cars, from sports cars to muscle machines. Buckle up and start the race!

title: G Wagon City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate busy morning streets, managing fuel and realistic traffic. Venture beyond the city to tackle rugged offroad terrain. Stunning morning graphics bring the city and landscapes to life, while unpredictable pedestrians and police chases add excitement. Customize your G-Wagon's look and performance, and enjoy the ride with your loyal dog. Whether evading cops or exploring trails, G-Wagon City Driver offers a thrilling experience.

title: Pool Merge Mania
description:
Pool Merge Mania!

Get ready for a wildly addictive twist on classic pool mechanics!
In Pool Merge Mania, shoot balls into the arena and watch them bounce, collide, and merge into higher-level balls. 

But beware, you can only have 15 balls on the table.

Tip: Fewer balls = more control. Merge them quick to stay in the game!

title: MineTap Merge Clicker
description:
MineTap is an idle clicker with merge mechanics and crafting. Also there is an adventure, where you can fight zombies and other monsters and even build your own village!

Enjoy mining and treasure hunting. Complete quests and level up your character. Craft your ultimate weapon and slay epic monsters!
Have you ever had a dream to be a hero and save the world? Then tap to play and become a legend of crafting.
Start your epic mining adventure right now - click, tap & rock!

title: Horror Forest Bear
description: Imagine an angry bear that has escaped from its cave in the forest. It's very hungry and wants to eat honey. You must help the bear. The bear is starving, and it needs to eat all the honey. You need to be very careful—it's a dark and dangerous forest, full of traps and hunters. The hunters have become much stronger because they can shoot with guns now. You must avoid the hunters. Escape from them, collect all the honey, and return to the bear's cave.

title: Scary Pairs
description: In the new exciting online game Scary Pairs you will have fun going through the levels of an interesting puzzle that is dedicated to Halloween. In front of you on the screen you will see a playing field on which a certain number of cards will be located. They lie face down and in one move you can turn over any two cards. Look at the images on them, because after a while the cards will return to their original state and you will make your move again.

title: Doge Bubble
description: Doge Bubble is a classic bubble shooter game with multiple challenging levels. Doge Bubbles features the classic bubble shooter gameplay with 3 powerups: The rocket that clears the chosen path, the bomb that clears up to 8 bubbles at a time and the multi color bubble. The goal in each level is to "free" all the doge bubbles.

title: Wall Hop
description: Every wall has a purpose. Every move is a lesson. Learn the mechanics, feel the flow, and gradually unlock the mental agility needed to navigate increasingly complex challenges.

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you move colored shapes around the board and guide them to gates of the matching color. Each correct connection fills the cups inside the shape — your goal is to fill the entire figure without blocking the path.

title: Dalgona Game2
description:
There's a cute shape on the dalgona, a snack from the past.
Be careful not to break the shape.
It's complete if you take it out nicely in a pretty way to go!

title: Dog Escape
description: Welcome to Dog Escape, the hide-and-seek puzzle where saving a dog is only the beginning. Guide a lost canine through traps and guards, then bring it home to cuddle, feed, and style! If you adore puppy-care, dress-up, and dog games with heart, this is your new daily ritual. Rescue your puppies now!

title: Christmas Candy Escape 3D
description: Christmas Candy Escape 3D is a casual puzzle in which you have to fall safely. It is deceptively simple, yet profoundly deep. Play through the extensive stages, sharpening your wits as you have fun. Have a try!

title: Merge Flowers
description:
Merge Flowers is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game! Grow your vibrant garden, discover unique flowers, and earn coins. Enjoy merge puzzle and match-3 mechanics as you combine flowers to create a blooming paradise.
With simple controls and cozy visuals, place flowers strategically to make space for new plants. Perfect for puzzle lovers and fans of casual idle games, Merge Flowers offers endless fun and a soothing experience. Start your floral journey today!

title: Cop Simulator
description: Cop Simulator is an exciting and dynamic gaming experience that immerses you in the world of a lawman with unlimited possibilities. In this game you will take on the role of a cop, where you are given complete freedom of action.

title: Maze Escape Toilet Rush
description: What's the most urgent situation you can imagine? Of course, it is the last second of finding a toilet. In Maze Escape: Toilet Rush, you'll have a nervous and hilarious maze escape. Each level is a brand-new maze. You need to find the best route to the toilet quickly. Use your logic and intelligence to reach your destination successfully.

title: BURGER CATCH
description: Move the tray left and right to collect the ordered ingredients! If time runs out or you collect too many extra ingredients, you will lose hearts. If you run out of hearts, it's game over.

title: Drive To Survive
description:
Dive into the world of the zombie apocalypse, where your car is the only weapon!
Shoot down hordes of zombies, earn money and unlock new powerful cars.

Earn money - use your skills to become a master of survival!
Buy cars - from classics to supercars!
Explore new locations - each level is full of challenges!

Show the zombies who's boss!

title: Komaru cat
description:
Take care of Komaru the cat! Pet her, feed her, bathe her, and tuck her in for sleep!
Dress her up in stylish looks! Hats, glasses, collars, new fur colors, and more! Experiment and create your own unique cat!
Play the merge mini-game, compete on the leaderboard, and earn coins!
Watch the best video memes with funny moments from her life!
Complete the daily challenges and come back tomorrow, Komaru will miss you!
Try to unlock all achievements! Come and have fun!

title: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion
description: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion is an action-packed horde survival game where you soar through the skies on a magical broom, battling waves of enemies! Defeat foes and gather experience points to level up and grow stronger. Unlock and master powerful spells, evolving them to take down enemies even faster. Good luck in your battles!

title: Mahjong Masters
description:
Enter the world of Mahjong Masters, where classic Mahjong meets fast-paced tile matching! 
In this exciting game, players have 2 minutes to match as many Mahjong tile pairs as possible. 
Each round is a thrilling battle against a new opponent. 
Accumulate battle points with each victory to climb the leaderboard and become the ultimate Mahjong Master.

title: Capybara Mukbang ASMR
description: Welcome to Capybara Mukbang ASMR, a casual cooking ASMR game that you can play for free. Dive into a delicious world where you cook hamburger, pizza, and ice cream recipes.
