You can move your position as well as use the cleaning tool by clicking on the buttons on the screen or by hitting the keyboard.

title: Caterfall 2048
description: Caterfall 2048 is a vibrant reimagining of the classic 2048 puzzle set in a cozy feline atmosphere. It combines familiar merging mechanics with a hexagonal grid and fun "jelly" physics. This game is perfect for all puzzle lovers — whether you want to relax or you're a competitive player striving for a new high score.

title: Space Survivor
description: Jump right into the action, fighting dangerous aliens and executing amazing maneuvers! Sharpen your weapons and skills, you will need them to last as long as possible.

title: Tangled Snakes - Sort Puzzle
description:
Untangle all the tangled snakes in this fun and satisfying puzzle game!

Tangled Snakes – Sort Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging brain teaser where you must sort and free the snakes from their tangled mess. Strategically move them in the correct order to clear each level and put your problem-solving skills to the test! Can you untangle them all?

Features:
Simple & intuitive controls!
Mind-teasing gameplay!
Hundreds of unique levels!
Endless fun for all ages!

title: Traffic Racing
description: Traffic Racing is a fast-paced driving game that throws you into intense highway action where every second counts. Weave through heavy traffic at high speeds as you compete in Career Mode or test your skills against others in Racing League Online.

title: Ships 3D IO
description: Ships 3D is an IO game, multiplayer sailing ship simulator. The game is played in 'first person' where you control the sailor and move around the ship; interacting with the helm, sails and cannons. Sink enemy ships and shoot other players to score points.

title: Challenge Your Friends
description: Challenge yourself! With seven different games, you can experience thrilling moments whether you're playing solo or competing against your friends. Drunken Duel, Tug The Table, Stick Duel, Milk The Cow, and many more games are waiting for you! Plus, to make the competition even more fun, you can choose exciting dares to make  the matches unforgettable! For those who prefer solo play, 6 games are ready to keep you entertained! Step into this world of fun and enjoy the thrill of competition!

title: Battle Simulator - Sandbox
description:
You can play against the provided levels or create your own battle.

Victory depends only on the best strategy! With the most accurate placement of your army, you will achieve the best results!

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle
description:
Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle is a puzzle game to remove bolts from the board, by moving the bolts to other bolt holes. The game will be finished when all the boards are gone
This challenging and addictive Wooden Nuts & Bolts puzzle game will test your problem solving skills as you twist, turn and strategize your way through a maze of tricky Wooden tools. With each level, the puzzles become more complicated and complex.

title: BFFs Y2K Fashion
description: Welcome to BFFs Y2K Fashion, the exciting new fashion designer game that lets you explore the trend of the year 2000! With a wide selection of styles from the decade, you can create the perfect look and express your fashion sense. From skater girl skirts to ripped jeans and t-shirts, or even the classic Y2K look with fun-colored low-waisted jeans and crop tops, you can customize your outfit and become an ultimate fashion designer. Play now and let your style shine!

title: Fighter Stick Hero
description: Welcome to Figher Stick Hero Stickman, an exhilarating 2D stickman game that will test your dueling skills. Whether you're playing in an arcade or survival mode, get ready to engage in intense battles against your opponents. Choose from a variety of weapons, character colors, and character decorations to customize your stickman. Remember to attack while moving to gain an advantage and earn higher scores by defeating other stickmen.

title: Idle Factory Domination
description: Embark on a journey of industrial dominance in Idle Factory Domination. Click on cells to purchase land, invest in businesses and resources to initiate production, and steadily expand your empire to unlock new territories, all while amassing wealth and asserting your manufacturing prowess.

title: Neighborhood Defense
description: Neighborhood Defense is a dynamic tower defense strategy game where your mission is to protect your neighborhood from waves of zombies. Diverse maps with multiple exits, different types of enemies, and limited tower spots make each match unique. Upgrade your towers, combine their abilities, and plan your tactics carefully to stop the horde and prevent them from breaking through.

title: Fire Truck Driving Simulator
description: Fire Truck Driving Simulator is a fire truck driving simulation game with 4 different modes. In Level Mode, you need to arrive at the fire area and put it out in time in 10 levels. In City Mode, you have a chance to decide to accept the emergency missions on the street freely. In Free Mode, you can train your fireman knowledge without any limitations. In Parking Mode, you can forget about fire-rescue missions and train your parking skills. Enjoy your fireman time!

title: BitGoblins RPG Simulator
description:
Become the protector of the kingdom from goblin robbers!

Get stronger by fighting goblin armies! Upgrade your hero with every battle, earn gold and get new items

Defeat the leaders of the goblins - the ogres! Gain strength after fighting goblin armies and test your skills

Explore the possibilities of this game! Start as a young wizard and upgrade your abilities, get new equipment and become the menace of goblins.

title: Obby The Legendary Dragon
description:
Experience the thrill of an addictive pet-catching simulator, perfect for Pokémon fans! Explore diverse Roblox worlds and level up your heroes all in one exciting adventure.
Gather health, upgrade your hero, and unlock incredible new worlds to discover. Catch pets in battles, hatch them from cases and eggs, and trade or purchase them to build a team of powerful allies and friends. Earn money, climb the ranks, and enhance your Obby character with prestigious titles and upgrades!

title: Grunge Chic Alt Fashion
description:
Step into the edgy world of Grunge Chic Alt Fashion, where style meets attitude. This dress-up game lets you explore the perfect mix of grunge edge and chic sophistication.

From plaid skirts and ripped jeans to oversized jackets, fishnets, and combat boots—you’ll have endless options to design your alternative fashion star. Top it off with smoky makeup, bold lipstick, and layered accessories to complete the vibe.

title: Excavator Simulator 3D
description: Drive and operate realistic 3D construction vehicles in Excavator Simulator 3D. You can choose from different trucks, excavators, and Pincer Jaws to complete various missions and tasks. Whether you need to dig, clamp, lift, hammer, or forklift, you can switch the attachments easily and quickly. Learn how to control these powerful machines and enjoy the realistic physics and graphics. Complete the levels faster and earn more money to buy more vehicles and unlock new challenges. Have fun!

title: V And N Pizza Cooking Game
description: Experience the ultimate virtual pizza-making adventure with the V And N Pizza Cooking Game! Craft delicious pizzas from scratch, choose mouthwatering toppings, and master the art of baking. From classic favorites to innovative creations, unleash your inner chef and create culinary masterpieces.

title: Obby Tower
description:
Climb. Think. Survive.

Ascend a towering obstacle course filled with tricky jumps, moving platforms — and surprise math challenges! Combine your parkour skills with quick thinking to make it to the top.

Perfect for players who love obbies and want to test both reflexes and brainpower.

title: Rope King
description: The Rope King is a fun and casual competitive game. In the game, players will control the characters to perform various strange rope skipping challenges. The game is simple and easy to use, the theme is humorous and funny, the game style is exquisite and creative, and it is matched with various funny actions and cool and dynamic sound effects. You will definitely love it.

title: Dan the Man
description: With a cracking funny story, action, an awesome upgradeable fighting skills and an epic arsenal of weapons that will make even the most heroic of heroes envious, Dan The Man's arcade fight fest has enough enemies and boss fights to satisfy every hardcore Action Platformer enthusiast and every indie game lover.

title: Stickhole.io
description: "Stickhole.io" is a thrilling game with single and two-player modes. In single player, swallow stickman and defeat bosses within time limits. In two-player mode, compete to eat the most stickman, then battle with collected characters. Dynamic gameplay and colorful graphics make it addictive and fun.

title: MMA Super Fight
description: The crowd is roaring, the spotlight is on you. From rookie to legend — face endless fights, unlock unique fighters and upgrade power, defense, health and regeneration. With every match, the pressure rises. The ring never sleeps and neither can you.

title: Stickboys Hook
description: Swing with Stickboys and jump your way to the finish line. Stickboys needs your help. Assist him and reach the goal! Jump from launch ramps and shoot webs to get to the end. You must complete every level. Be careful — if you fall from the sky, you lose the game.

title: Madness Cars Destroy
description:
The game features 6 unique modes:

Funnel: Push cars into the abyss as the funnel narrows!
Rotating Cube: Stay on the spinning cube, which speeds up over time!
Deadly Arena: Dodge falling bombs and collapsing floors—or shoot players instead!
Right Color: Inspired by Roblox, but with cars!
Deadly Bouncers: Avoid spinning mines in a gladiator-style arena!
Hot Potato: Pass the bomb or explode!
Choose from foreign or Russian cars and dive into the action!

title: Ride Shooter
description: What if the whole world is filled with zombies? Of course get in a car, equip it with weapons and armor, and then break through to the others! What's next? Machine gun, laser and attack helicopter!

title: COINs
description: A line of 10 coins with the same number changes to a coin with one higher number. Coins can be moved anywhere, even to empty lines or on coins with different numbers. You can add coins at any time. The game is cleared if you make a coin with the number 10! The faster the clear time, the higher the score.

title: Rootlings: Secrets of the Depths
description: Dive into Rootlings: Secrets of the Depths, an innovative turn-based game where you guide a root deep into the mysterious underworld. Collect water to survive, avoid hazards, and uncover surprises across exciting levels. Choose from Levels mode for challenges or Endless mode to climb the global leaderboard. Customize your root with stylish hats and enjoy minimalistic graphics and relaxing sounds in this unique underground adventure!

title: Survive The Night
description: Are you ready for the most terrifying night of your life? Survive The Night is an intense horror survival game where you’re trapped in a dark, creepy room with something lurking in the shadows. Choose between Normal Mode or Horror Mode to challenge yourself. In Normal Mode, you'll receive more hints, fewer rooms, and standard monsters.

title: Typing Adventure
description: Get ready for a fast-paced typing challenge in Typing Adventure! Type the words above each enemy to defeat them before they get too close. The longer you survive, the faster they come! How long can your fingers keep up? Battle endless waves and test your speed in this thrilling typing survival game!

title: Northern Lights - the secret of the forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Match 3 game genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

title: Dragon Draw Joust
description: Prepare for a wildly creative showdown in Dragon Draw Joust, where your imagination becomes your strongest weapon! Instead of choosing gear from a menu, you must draw your own tools to defend your warrior and survive intense combat challenges. Every match feels fresh because your strategy starts with your creativity. Your creation instantly becomes part of your character, helping you block attacks or strike opponents inside the chaotic battle arena.

title: Bubble Shooter Aura
description:
Bubble Shooter Aura brings a fresh, glowing twist to the classic bubble-shooting experience.
Enter a world of soft colors, smooth animations, and relaxing “aura” effects as you match and pop bubbles to clear levels and reach high scores.

Perfect for both casual players and bubble shooter fans, this game offers intuitive controls, satisfying gameplay, and a modern look that feels calm, fun, and addictive.

title: Emergency Jam
description: As you progress, encounter cars in 8 different colors, adding complexity to your strategy. Use powerful boosters to line up characters by color or shuffle vehicles, clearing the way more efficiently. Test your logic, think fast, and rescue passengers.

title: Shelf Shift Match
description: Test your strategy and speed in Shelf Shift Match! Shift items on the shelves to create perfect matches of three, clearing the way to reveal hidden shadowed items. But beware—unwise moves can block your shelves, leaving no space to shift and leading to game over! If you're stuck, use the shuffle button to mix things up and find new matches.

title: Harbor Operator
description:
As the harbor master and operator, navigate incoming ships to the correct docks. Tap and drag to draw routes into the docks, while taking into account the unloading time, speed, and other visual indicators.

Control beautiful ships such as yachts, super yachts, container ships, oil tankers and more. Plan your routes to avoid any shipping accidents.

title: Sandstorm Covert Ops
description: Welcome to Sandstorm Covert Ops. As the leader of an elite team, your mission is to infiltrate a desert region controlled by a deadly terrorist organization. Navigate harsh terrains, gather crucial intelligence, and execute precise strikes to dismantle the enemy network.

title: Fat Cat Life
description: In this game you will have a bunch of cats to choose from, a huge selection of hats and a variety of tasks. From the simplest to the most difficult.

title: Hexa Stack
description: Welcome to Hexa Stack—an all-new hexagon puzzle that’s equal parts relaxing and challenging. Sort colorful tiles by color, stack smart to create powerful combos, and think ahead before the board fills up. Each level adds new twists, requiring focus, memory, and clever planning. Stuck? Use boosters like swap and shuffle to keep your run alive. Simple controls, satisfying merges, and nonstop brain fun!

title: Ropeway Master
description:
Ropeway Master is a new challenging puzzle game. You should utilize the rope to free everyone,control the rope, overcome the obstacles, and complete the demanding and unique puzzle game. The
game is not difficult! Drag the rope to make a safe path, control the rope, and rescue everyone.Don't forget to avoid the obstacles along the way. If you play Rope Puzzle, make sure you do nothing. You will play for hours and linger.

title: Cute Craft Lab
description: Step into the colorful world of Cute Craft Lab, a super casual game where creativity shines and every girl can become a true crafting designer. If you love relaxing gameplay mixed with adorable creativity, this cute design adventure is made just for you. In Cute Craft Lab, enter a magical workshop filled with charming tools, sparkling decorations, and endless crafting possibilities.

title: Dino Ranch
description:
JON & BLITZ - IT’S VELOCI-TIME!
• Throwing the lasso to the escaped compies
• Dodging herds of ankylosaurus.
• Finding the naughty compies.
• Feeding Angus.
• Flying and dodging objects with Pteddy
• Moving the dinosaurs to the stable.
• Challenging the Trihorn Raptor to a race.
• Helping the compies to jump across the river.

title: Bingo Halloween
description: A Halloween-themed bingo game where you can win exciting bingos to unlock spooky candy-themed images. Enjoy multiple call speeds and progressive unlocks.

title: Sprunki Puzzles and Singing
description: Before the sprunks take on their immediate duties, namely creating music, you must unlock sixteen characters. In the meantime, you have no one to create your own melodies with. To bring the Sprunki back to life, you must collect an image of each Sprunki. The picture consists of nine square fragments that are mixed on the playing field. Swap them and install them in the correct positions. Having collected all the puzzles, you can start making music in Sprunki Puzzles and Singing.

title: Stickman Adventure
description: This is an adventure that will take you through time and space! Along the way, you'll encounter various traps and monsters; you'll need to defeat them and rescue your friends. Come on, Hero, a whole new world awaits!

title: Road Digging Puzzle
description:
This is a puzzle game. you can make a way to pass a level. Dig your way through unique physics puzzles.

It's new and fun brain teasers each step of the way.

title: Draw To Smash!
description:
Draw To Smash — a logic puzzle game in which you should draw a line, scribbles, figures or doodles to smash all the bad eggs.

Draw To Smash is an amusing logic game that will test your IQ and raise your intellectual abilities to a new level. Plan every step, estimate a possible outcome and build tactical strategies. Solve logical puzzles, pass interesting levels and open bonus levels.

title: Fruit Match
description:
A fresh twist on fruit puzzles!
Tap two identical fruits to detach them and send them falling into the basket.

But it’s not that simple — fruits follow real physics. They can get stuck, stack, and only fall further when you clear what’s below.
Use gravity to your advantage, trigger chain reactions, and watch satisfying cascades unfold.

Clear the board and keep the flow going as new fruits drop in!

title: Bus Stop Color Jam
description: A great passenger color sorting game begins with the Bus Stop Color Jam game! Sort the passengers by their color and get them into the buses. Once the buses are full, they will move to the destination point. Use power-ups when you need them. Over 400+ game levels are waiting for you! An entertaining Bus Stop Jam is beginning!

title: Mr Throw
description: Mr Throw is a game in which even an old teddy bear can become a deadly weapon! Calculate the strength and direction of the throw and throw at the enemy all the things that come to hand! Victory in this dangerous garbage battle!

title: 67 Clicker
description:
Forget everything you know about gaming. Experience the absolute peak of interactive entertainment. It’s not just a number; it’s a lifestyle. Tap the 67 and watch your empire grow.

FULLY AUTOMATED STONKS: Buy upgrades to make the 67 click itself. It’s literally free real estate.

PEAK BRAIN ROT: No thoughts, just 67. The perfect idle experience for fans of "number go up" simulators.

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Stack Battle.io
description:
It is a fun and casual puzzle. In the game, the game screen is fresh and simple, and the cute cartoon style is very eye-catching. The biggest highlight is the addition of tower defense battles to the brick-moving gameplay. The game level is very rich, and the gameplay is very simple. 
You can control the movement of the character by pressing and sliding on the screen.
What the player has to do is to control the character to collect the bricks on the map, stack the bricks and send them to your base. When there are enough bricks, your base will be upgraded and the area will be expanded and the number of tower defenses will be increased. 
When the enemy enters the range of your tower defense, you will be attacked. 
On the contrary, when you enter the range of the enemy tower defense, you will also be attacked. whichever side is attacked and dies first will fail the game, otherwise it will succeed.
Players who like brick-moving games come and download it.

title: Shopaholic Black Friday
description: Experience fashion fun like never before with the Shopaholic Black Friday game! Navigate through makeup products, and indulge in chic fashion pieces. Hit the mall, shop as many items as you can before the time runs out, and then return for another styling adventure. Explore an array of lipstick hues, experiment with smoky eyes, or go for colorful shadows, and browse through fashionable dresses, trendy tops, and stylish shoes. Complete the look with dazzling accessories and designer bags.

title: Tap Gallery
description:
Tap Gallery is the ultimate puzzle game where you test your brain and tap away blocks to uncover hidden images. 
This iq game challenges your logical thinking and provides satisfying puzzle-solving experiences that relieve anxiety. 
Each tap puzzle is a unique brain teaser designed to engage and entertain, making it one of the most addicting games in the puzzle genre.

title: 2048 Cube Merge
description: How far can your skills take you? Target, shoot and merge cubes while unlocking exciting upgrades and customizations. Enjoy captivating gameplay and stunning visuals with every move you make. The 2048 cube challenge begins now!

title: Dogs Spot The Differences
description: Immerse yourself in the charming world of 'Dogs: Spot the Differences,' a puzzle game featuring scenes filled with adorable companions. Challenge your observation skills, uncover subtle differences, and unlock new levels. With stunning visuals and escalating challenges, become a detective in a captivating journey of discovery and fun. Can you spot them all and become the ultimate enthusiast for your lovable companions?

title: Lost Adventure
description: Lost Adventure is a survival puzzle game where you guide a determined pilot through a strange, untamed land after a mid-air crash. Craft tools, mine resources, and solve clever challenges as you race to rescue scattered passengers. Your choices shape their fate—will you lead them to safety before the wilderness claims them for good?

title: NSR Street Car Racing
description:
Hit the Streets & Dominate the Race! 
Jump into heart-pounding street racing action! Customize powerful cars, master drifts, unleash nitro boosts, and challenge real players in multiplayer races and intense 1v1 duels. Become a street-racing legend!

Ready, Set, Drift!

title: Supermarket Sort: Grocery Game
description: Sharpen your sorting skills, challenge your brain, and race against the clock in each level. With increasingly tricky puzzles and tons of grocery items to sort, the fun never stops!

title: Air Block
description:
Jump, Place Blocks, and Conquer Challenging Levels!

In Air Block, use quick reflexes and smart block placement to overcome obstacles and enemies. With limited blocks per level, every move counts! Avoid saws, spikes, and unlock doors to progress—plus, grab those bananas if you can!

Game Modes:

Single Player – Test your skills across unique levels.
Two-Player Mode – Compete in quick place challenges and mini-games like Beach Ball, with more to come!
Think you’ve got what it takes? Start now!

title: FaceChart
description: Do you dream of creating wild, fabulous looks like your favorite artists on social media? Dive into the enchanting realm of Face Chart! Wondering what a face chart is? It's your chic canvas to plan the next jaw-dropping, glamorous look. Grab a piece of paper and let it be your pocket-sized playground—experiment with new colors you hesitated to wear, pick and mix diverse designs for an endless array of possibilities.

title: Forest Tiles
description: There are several coins on the 9 by 9 playing field. It is necessary to place the blocks on the playing field in such a way as to completely assemble a vertical or horizontal line. Gold coins can be used to reset unnecessary blocks and continue the game if you lose.

title: Arcade GP
description: ARCADE GP is a retro-style top-down Formula 1 racing game with strategic tire management and pit stop mechanics. Race against AI opponents, manage tire wear, and make tactical decisions to claim victory!

title: Italian Brainrot Find the Differences
description: In this game you have to locate the differences between the two pictures in the limited amount of time given to play each time! To play, use your mouse as control. Make sure that you don’t make a mistake more than three times because that will make you fail. One minute is the total time you will play through the 20 levels in this game! In each level you have seven differences. Good luck!

title: Canasta Royale Offline
description:
Canasta is the most traditional and loved card game by all. It is an exciting mix of strategy, luck and skill.Canasta uses two complete decks of 52 playing cards (French Deck) plus the four Jokers. All the Jokers and twos are wild cards.

Game Features:
★ 2 or 4 players
★ Clockwise or Counter-Clockwise
★ Game is automatically saved each turn, so you can close it and continue playing later
★ Undo function so you can cancel mistaken melds

title: Galaxy Carnage
description: Battle in space with countless enemies and their bosses coming in waves. Lots of weapons, lots of lasers, lots of explosions and effects. Upgrade the starship to the most powerful machine for exterminating alien invaders.

title: Mahjong Connect Gold
description: Mahjong Connect Gold is an exciting puzzle game with captivating gameplay that is known to all fans of the Mahjong series. Collect all the tiles by matching their pairs according to the rules of classic Mahjong. Immerse yourself in Mahjong's unique world and dive into this captivating puzzle's depths!

title: Clownfish Pin Out
description: Clownfish Pin Out is an interesting and cute puzzle game, you need to help one little fish escape from a dangerous place. Tap the pin to make the waterfall to the fish and avoid the lava. Think before you move, or you will lose. Come on!

title: Horseback Survival
description: Embark on a journey of survival in "Horseback Survival," where you, as Zohan, share an unbreakable connection with your horse, Badal. Born on the same day, your unique bond becomes a lifeline when a mysterious event leaves you in a coma. Navigate a zombie-infested world. Engage in intense combat with melee and ranged attacks, outsmart the undead by staying stealthy, and overcome obstacles with strategic running and jumping.

title: Office Solitaire
description: Office Solitaire is the classic solitaire variant with the objective of collecting all the cards to the top row in suited sequences from ace to king.

title: Digital Circus Find The Differences
description:
Step into the whimsical and wacky world of Digital Circus: Find The Differences, where fun meets challenge! Explore vibrant and surreal circus scenes filled with unique characters and zany details, all while sharpening your observation skills. Can you spot the subtle changes between two seemingly identical pictures?
Put your eyes to the test and discover how many differences you can find in this exciting puzzle adventure!

title: Ayla World Princess life
description: Step into the magical world of Ayla World: Princess Life, where you can live the ultimate princess adventure! This exciting game lets you dress up your avatar, create stunning outfits, and design beautiful nails with endless styles.

title: Racing Pinball
description:
"Racing Pinball" is a fast-paced arcade game that brings the timeless thrill of pinball to your device!
Launch the ball into action and use flippers to keep it in play, racking up points by hitting bumpers, targets, and ramps.
"Racing Pinball" needs skill and reflexes in a classic, addictive experience where the goal is simple: keep the ball rolling and aim for the high score!

title: Panda Kitchen Idle Tycoon
description: Want to become the best restaurant tycoon? You’ll build your own panda-themed food empire in Panda Kitchen: Idle Tycoon. Earn idle profits, and manage your way to success. Unlock new dining tables and kitchen equipment to improve efficiency. Recruiting chefs and servers to create an ultra-efficient restaurant team.

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: Obby Champions
description: A journey awaits you where every wall is a challenge, every obstacle is an ancient seal, and every punch is a step towards legend. Explore unique zones, fight titans, and find rare pets with unique abilities. Enter hidden codes, collect fragments of history, and leave your mark in the Hall of Echoes - only the strongest will be able to break all the seals and become the Fist of Legends!

title: Drawing Squares
description:
Drawing Squares is the logic game that will blow your mind!
It is a logic game inspired by the classic pen and paper game Dots and Boxes. Do you remember the game you used to play at school? (also known as Boxes, Squares, Paddocks, Pigs in a Pen, Square-it, Dots and Dashes, Dots, Smart Dots, Dot Boxing, or, simply, the Dot Game).

title: StickMan Gunner
description: StickMan Gunner is a fast-paced running game that puts players in control of a powerful gun zipping through levels. You guide it to pick up stickmen along the way, building up your crew while smashing through obstacles and enemies that pop up. It’s straightforward gameplay that keeps things moving without much downtime, making it a solid pick for short sessions during study breaks or downtime.

title: Spring Tile Master
description: Welcome to Spring Tile Master! Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of spring as you match tiles adorned with blooming flowers, colorful leaves, and charming insects. Draw tiles from the board to form sets of three. Keep up to 9 tiles in your stack and shuffle when needed. Collect all tiles to unlock new levels. Enjoy the enchanting springtime adventure and become the ultimate Spring Tile Master!

title: i8 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning supercar through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Count Escape Rush
description: Count Escape Rush plays like a 3D stickman running arcade game. Different from traditional running arcade games, your members will run backward and shoot the chasing enemies. With 3D stickman soldiers, you need to collect more members and weapons to fight incoming red enemies before you arrive at the finish line. Any obstacles will decrease your members or make you lose directly. Don't forget to pass the green numbered walls and collect weapons to increase your firepower.

title: Is it right
description:
This puzzle game will challenge your wits and attentiveness - do it right!
Look for pumping logic, look for the right colors, go through levels, open skins!

title: Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes
description:
Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes is an exciting game in which the player has to become a real wrecking racer.

There are many unique cars available in the game, each of which has its own characteristics and capabilities. From classic sports cars to massive monster trucks, you will have complete freedom to choose the vehicle for your crazy adventures.
